# Historical artifacts

## Why this folder exists

Retired outputs, migration packets, and evidence — not imported by the live app.

## What is here

- migrationdocs/ — migration playbook and handover (archived after merge)
- results/, outputs/, screenshots/ — test and audit history when present

## Rules

- Prefer archive over delete
- Do not import from archive/ in site/

---
*Generated by `site/scripts/generate-contents-md.mjs` — edit manifest, then `pnpm run docs:sync:all` from repo root.*
